title: What time
wikitext:
[]: What time?             Quote Post by wildarmsheero » Wed Aug 04, 2004 10:15 pm Does anyone know what time Eva was played when it first ran in Japan? I really wanna know...

[]: The things that keep me up at night...             Quote Post by Olin of Xephon » Wed Aug 04, 2004 10:50 pm I read somewhere that it came on at 7:30 P.M. All I know for sure is it was in prime time. God! can you imagine a show like Evangelion on in prime time? I can see it... Japanese father: Alright everyone! come on, Evangelion is almost on! Japanese kids: Yeah! Evangelion!

[]:             Quote Post by Crazyman42 » Thu Aug 05, 2004 8:50 pm WAIT NOW YOUR GOING TO WATCH IS ON THE DAYS IT WAS PLAYED AT THE EXACT SAME TIME IT WAS SHOWN! YOU FREAK!

[]:             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Thu Aug 05, 2004 9:04 pm Weird :?

[]:             Quote Post by wildarmsheero » Thu Aug 05, 2004 9:22 pm It's not weird...

[]:             Quote Post by EVA-01X » Thu Aug 05, 2004 9:43 pm He's just dedicated

[]:             Quote Post by wildarmsheero » Thu Aug 05, 2004 9:48 pm Hells yes I am.

[]:             Quote Post by Karma Burn » Thu Aug 05, 2004 9:51 pm No, now your just being a freak. There's a thin red line between fandom and obession. You're slowly crossing it with that one.

[]:             Quote Post by MongolSquad » Thu Aug 05, 2004 9:54 pm Your opinion is not going to stop him. Go for it Wildarms!

[]:             Quote Post by Karma Burn » Thu Aug 05, 2004 10:17 pm True, but that doesn't mean I still can't voice it.

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Thu Aug 05, 2004 10:40 pm Actually, I recall hearing from someone that it originally aired at about 5:00 p.m., that is, kiddie primetime. Midway through the series however, they had to move it back to a later time because of the unperdictability of the content, which was still being ironed out as the show went along. That could just be a rumor, though. Fandom. Kiss its ass.

[]:             Quote Post by wildarmsheero » Thu Aug 05, 2004 11:42 pm Augh, so many times. At least I have some time before the 10 year anniversary... I'll get my damn times eventually! Actually, it'd be great if I could get the orginal tapes shows complete with the commercials that aired when Eva first aired... hmmm... Edit: Post 100!

[]:             Quote Post by coff » Fri Aug 06, 2004 12:11 am Are you going to pretend you're Japanese while you watch it?

[]:             Quote Post by ShoKenju » Fri Aug 06, 2004 12:18 am UBER GOSU KAWAII!!!!!!! anyways, yeah...thats i little on the creepy side

[]:             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Fri Aug 06, 2004 4:33 am Ok you are not weird but you are creepy though

[]:             Quote Post by houtaru » Fri Aug 06, 2004 4:40 am wildarmsheero wrote: Actually, it'd be great if I could get the orginal tapes shows complete with the commercials that aired when Eva first aired... hmmm..

[]:             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Fri Aug 06, 2004 4:46 am houtaru wrote: wildarmsheero wrote: Actually, it'd be great if I could get the orginal tapes shows complete with the commercials that aired when Eva first aired... hmmm..

[]:             Quote Post by wildarmsheero » Fri Aug 06, 2004 8:56 am coff wrote: Are you going to pretend you're Japanese while you watch it?

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Fri Aug 06, 2004 12:58 pm Damnit wildarms, I could have gone my whole life without ever hearing of this idea. When you find out what times it did air (or find some tapes of the original airings) let me know.

[]:             Quote Post by coff » Fri Aug 06, 2004 3:34 pm I just don't understand the whole obsession with wanting to be Japanese.
